subject: [FINAL IOWA POLL] Clinton: 45% - Sanders 42%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Just about 15 minutes ago, the _Des Moines Register_ released their final poll before the Iowa caucus, and we wanted to make sure you saw the results right away:
**Des Moines Register Poll - Iowa (January 30, 2016)**
**Clinton:** 45%
**Sanders:** 42%
We've come so far. Can you imagine how you would feel if we come up just short in Iowa? Especially when our numbers against Republicans are so strong.
[**Your $3 contribution to Bernie 's campaign, right now, could mean the difference between victory and defeat in the Democratic primary for our political revolution. Make one today.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2c98/43f17890/7f77ae93/6209cf4a/3695727899/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/final-iowa-poll?refcode=em160130-e")

As you read this message, our offices are buzzing across Iowa and New Hampshire. Thousands of volunteers are working their tails off talking to caucus-goers and voters on the phones and at their homes. If every person who has signed up to join our political revolution made a contribution to Bernie's campaign today, we would be unstoppable.

name: Mary Pat Christie
subject: Did you see Chris' email yesterday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:

name: Chris Christie
subject: It's time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter,
Tomorrow are the Iowa Caucuses and I just wanted to check in. This has been an entertaining campaign, right? I've been entertained. I'm sure you've been too.
But, the time for entertaining is now over, we are not electing an entertainer-in-chief, we are a electing a Commander-in-Chief.
"Make America Great Again" should be more than a damn slogan on a hat. Ok? It's more than that, it has to be something more. Peter, we need a leader in this country who runs into the fight when things get tough, not someone who runs away when things go bad. **[I will be that leader](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46020533:6xrUrwrN3:m:1:1516426255:6F74EE38F1EB1292DE9D43ACBE056907:r)**.
Peter, don't be distracted by the show. We need to pick someone who can fix the problems that Barack Obama has left us with. We know it's not Hillary Clinton. This is real life and it's your future. **[It's time to stand up and fight together](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46020533:6xrUrwrN3:m:1:1516426255:6F74EE38F1EB1292DE9D43ACBE056907:r)**.
As you think about who you want as President, ask yourself this, "Who's the most tested? Who's the most mature? Who's the most ready?" **[I am that person](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46020533:6xrUrwrN3:m:1:1516426255:6F74EE38F1EB1292DE9D43ACBE056907:r)**.
I want to be YOUR President, Peter. I want to restore this country to the values our veterans fought and died for all around the world, so America will always be the greatest hope for freedom, liberty, and prosperity that the world has ever known. However, I can't get there without your help, **[will you chip in $10, $20, or maybe even $50 and I promise I will face the fight for you](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46020533:6xrUrwrN3:m:1:1516426255:6F74EE38F1EB1292DE9D43ACBE056907:r)**.

Ready to get to work for you,
Chris

body:
Courageous Conservatives \- Reigniting the Promise of America
**Hello Friend,**
When we launched this campaign on March 23rd, they said we were crazy. The Washington Establishment, the media, and the political chattering class said it was impossible -- that Ted could never win. **But here we are**. Ted is polling second in the nation, and we're in a dead heat in the Iowa caucuses tomorrow.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33236762:sM1JHRyNn:m:1:1104269936:BD93DF5CA61443D89EEF45FA7AB41E31:r)
In advance of caucus day on Monday, I want to reflect back on what we've accomplished together. We have an organization that is truly second to none. We've raised more money than any other Republican in the race. We have a sophisticated data and analytics operation that is allowing us to efficiently target voters. We have endorsements from some of the most prominent conservative leaders in the nation. Over 200,000 of you have signed up to volunteer with the campaign (over 12,000 in Iowa alone). Over 700,000 of you have contributed financially to make this all possible.
Poll after poll indicates this is a two person race. We're neck and neck for the lead, and what we do between now and tomorrow can push us over the finish line for a first place finish. Even more astonishing is the position in which we find ourselves just ahead of the first in the nation caucus considering the long odds we faced at the beginning.
Seeking the Republican nomination this year are the two most recent winners of the Iowa caucuses. Both Mick Huckabee and Rick Santorum find themselves in the low single digits. Scott Walker, Rick Perry, and Bobby Jindal all have extremely accomplished records as governors in their home states and are some of the best retail politicians in America. They're no longer in this race, and this week, we were proud to announce the endorsement of Gov. Rick Perry and have him join us on the campaign trail in Iowa.
We have opponents in this race with incredible fundraising networks who have unleashed attack after attack against Ted. We've faced an assault from their well-financed super PACs as well. The ethanol lobby -- which is highly influential in the state of Iowa -- is coming after Ted because he doesn't believe Washington politicians should be picking winners and losers in the energy sector and handing out special subsidies to one industry or another. In total, we've absorbed over $8 million in attack ads.
The long odds we faced from the very beginning make our current position even more impressive. We had a mountain to climb unlike anyone in recent political history. **We're in a strong position to reach the peak**.
Why? Because in Ted, the American people see a principled conservative leader who will tell them the truth, and who does what he says he will do. Now it's up to us to turn out and win!
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33236763:sM1JHRyNn:m:1:1104269936:BD93DF5CA61443D89EEF45FA7AB41E31:r)
Let's shock the political world again tomorrow. If the Cruz Crew turns out to caucus, we win. It's that simple. If you're in Iowa and want to know how to #CaucusForCruz, our campaign put together [this instructional video](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33236764:sM1JHRyNn:m:1:1104269936:BD93DF5CA61443D89EEF45FA7AB41E31:r) \-- **[click here to watch it now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33236764:sM1JHRyNn:m:1:1104269936:BD93DF5CA61443D89EEF45FA7AB41E31:r)**. And if you're ready to caucus, **[please click here to share it with your friends](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33236765:sM1JHRyNn:m:1:1104269936:BD93DF5CA61443D89EEF45FA7AB41E31:r)**!
I can't thank you enough for everything you've helped us accomplish so far. Now let's go win the Iowa caucuses -- _**together.**_ This is OUR time!
To victory,
**Jeff Roe**
**Campaign Manager**
**Cruz for President**

subject: a leading liberal voice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Dear Friend,

My parents raised me to believe that elections are about people. And that the truth can prevail against any odds when voters are engaged and aware.

I believe that. That's why I want you to know that tonight is the first budget deadline of 2016 and we need your help to stop a national SuperPAC that just spent $1 million against my dad. **[Can you donate now and help him fight back?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ce3/70cdc2ba/47c6aa84/3965a94/1509511298/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-jan-eom?refcode=em13116&amount=25&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+donate+now+and+help+him+fight+ba&utm_campaign=em3116&source=em3116")**

I'm very proud of my dad's tireless efforts to shut down secret money in politics. The Center for Public Integrity called him "a leading liberal voice" on disclosure. As Maryland's next Senator I know he will stop at nothing to shine the light of transparency on campaign spending.

But, none of this matters if we don't stop the outside SuperPAC trying to defeat him.

**[If you make a contribution now it will go straight into our _Stop the SuperPAC Fund._](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ce3/70cdc2ba/47c6aa84/3965a95/1509511298/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-jan-eom?refcode=em13116&amount=25&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+If+you+make+a+contribution+now+it+will+g&utm_campaign=em3116&source=em3116")**

This election is in your hands -- right where it should be!

Thank you.

Anna

Like I've said, primaries and caucuses aren't about poll numbers, or pundit predictions. It's about turning people out. And that's exactly what they're doing , overwhelmingly, for this campaign in the final hours before voting begins. But here's the thing: I can't take this fight by storm unless all of my supporters like you --every single one--are ready to fight with me for the final hours. Even though we're ready to shock the political class tomorrow night with our results, we can't take anything for granted. The difference between a shock and a bust tomorrow, quite literally, may come down to your support. I need to know you have my back, Right away. Can't do this without you! Carly | "DONATE NOW" | | | PAID FOR BY CARLY FOR PRESIDENT

subject: FW: Will you help us meet our goal?
body:
| Peter, We're almost there -- we only need to raise $3,209 to meet our January goal by midnight tonight!

As one of our top supporters, we want to make sure we get your name on the wall! Please contribute $20.16 or more now to secure your spot: [http://robportman.com/get_on_the_wall](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/get_on_the_wall?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eom_jan_4&n=1) Sincerely, Corry \---------- Forwarded message \---------- From: Rob Portman <robportman@robportman.com> Date: Sun, Jan 31, 2016 at 1:00 PM Subject: Will you help us meet our goal? To: corrybliss@robportman.com[

](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/get_on_the_wall?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eom_jan_4&n=2) Peter --

Our volunteers and supporters are the driving force behind this campaign and we want everyone who comes into our campaign headquarters to know that. I am honored to have the support of over 14,000 conservative activists -- and we need to raise $14,000 online today to help us reach our January fundraising goal!

[Peter, will you chip in $20.16, $50, $100, or more today to become an official supporter and have your name placed on the wall at our campaign HQ?](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/get_on_the_wall?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eom_jan_4&n=3)
[](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/get_on_the_wall?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eom_jan_4&n=4)
National Democrats have said that the road to the White House and the Senate Majority runs through Ohio. That's why they have already spent over $1 million attacking me on TV and will spend millions more from now until November.

The choice is clear: a future where Ted Strickland and Hillary Clinton take Ohio backward, or our vision for a future where you and I work together to restore American strength, freedom, opportunity, job growth, and higher wages.

[Peter, will you help us reach our goal of raising $14,000 online today?

](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/get_on_the_wall?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eom_jan_4&n=5)All best,

Rob Portman

P.S. We rely on donations from supporters like you, Peter. If you'd like to donate _without_ having your name added to the wall in our campaign headquarters, please click [here

](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/reach_our_january_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eom_jan_4&n=6) [](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/get_on_the_wall?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eom_jan_4&n=7) [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eom_jan_4&n=8)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eom_jan_4&n=9)[

](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/get_on_the_wall?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eom_jan_4&n=10)

| Friend,

When it comes to fighting ISIS, President Obama’s not just incompetent, he dangerous. And it’s put every American’s life at risk. In fact, I believe how Obama has handled the threat from radical Islam, and his shocking assistance in helping Iran get a nuclear bomb, are two of the **greatest betrayals by a Commander and Chief in America’s history.** The link below is for a video I just release that has rapidly gone viral. It exposes Obama and Clinton’s national security failures, explain why they have put American’s lives in grave danger, and highlights how we can destroy ISIS before they’re here in our own backyard. [](http://www.ricksantorum.com/the_plan_to_defeat_isis?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=isis_ad&n=1)
It’s absolutely critical as many Americans see this video ASAP. **I don’t want you to send even** **one cent to my campaign.** Instead, I am asking...and praying, that you will forward this email to 5 friends, neighbors or family members, and ask them to watch this revealing video. Obama and Clinton have hidden from the American people just how dangerous the situation really is. This video will blow the lid off that! Please place this video on your social networks and forward this email to at least 5 people. **If you do this, it’s very possible we will end Clinton’s campaign for President, and save countless American lives.** God Bless. _Rick Santorum_
